summary: Final Orchestration Extraction Pass - All 30 guardrail tests pass. Verified 3 new service modules (document_classification, mailbox_polling, run_upload_and_link_workflow in document_linking) are importable and callable. document_handlers.py is FULLY DECOUPLED from server.py. Only 2 files import server.py (mailbox_sources.py, mailbox_polling.py - both in allowlist). Route count stable at 427. server.py reduced from 7831 to 7467 lines.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Deprecation warnings for regex param (should use pattern) in bc_sandbox.py and pilot.py - non-blocking
Minor: PydanticDeprecatedSince20 warning for min_items in inventory_ledger.py (should use min_length) - non-blocking
Minor: on_event deprecation in main.py (should use lifespan event handlers) - non-blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final orchestration extraction complete. 3 new orchestration functions extracted: classify_document_type (document_classification.py), poll_mailbox_for_documents (mailbox_polling.py), run_upload_and_link_workflow (document_linking.py). document_handlers.py is now FULLY decoupled from server.py - no _server() lazy import, no srv.* calls. Only 2 files still import from server.py (both documented in allowlist). server.py is now ~7467 lines (down from 7831).

frontend_verified.dashboard: Loads with all metrics (79 docs, 2.5% validation rate, 51.9% vendor match rate)

mocked_apis_note: Microsoft Graph email API, BC write operations, and JWT Auth (Entra ID) are MOCKED in demo mode
